title: Perfectiøn
description:
Real time white silhouette lighting following the performer on stage
	                        / Two Kinect and two video projectors facing down onto the stage are matched to cover the same surface
                            / The Kinects volumetric image are processed to extract the silhouette of the dancer and erase the background
                            / More matching is done in MadMapper to precisely match the silhouette with the dancer
	                        / Real time video effects controlled live through a midi controller in MaxMSP-Jitter
